source: BSV mainnet block at height 170. Fetched live from the WhatsOnChain BSV API (https://api.whatsonchain.com/v1/bsv/main/block/height/170). Two transactions: the coinbase, and the historic Satoshi-to-Hal-Finney transfer. Used to verify the implementation against a real BSV-anchored Merkle root with the odd/even handling exercised.
notes: Display order = big-endian, as shown by block explorers. The Merkle-tree algorithm hashes the byte-reverse (internal little-endian) of these txids. The expected_root_internal_le value is the byte-reverse of merkleroot_display_be.
